# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.payment-provider.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - analytics.thirdparty.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: analytics.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.10
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 198.51.100.10
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "data-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "data-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 5432
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-db.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.20
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 198.51.100.20
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mongodb.external-db.com
        port:
          number: 27017
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.30
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 198.51.100.30
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external-cache.com
        port:
          number: 6379
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
      - s3.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-email-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.sendgrid.net
  ports:
  - number: 587
    name: tcp-smtp
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 465
    name: tcp-smtps
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-email-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.sendgrid.net
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 587
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.sendgrid.net
        port:
          number: 587
  - match:
    - port: 465
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.sendgrid.net
        port:
          number: 465
---

kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-oauth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - oauth.provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "auth-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-oauth-provider
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - oauth.provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "auth-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - oauth.provider.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: oauth.provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-weather-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.weather.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "weather-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-weather-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.weather.com
  exportTo:
  - "weather-service"
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/v1/"
    headers:
      request:
        add:
          x-mesh-source: "weather-service"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.weather.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 10s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 3s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "location-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-maps-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
  - "location-service"
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/maps/api/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 15s
    retries:
      attempts: 2
      perTryTimeout: 5s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.40
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: http-es
    protocol: HTTP
  - number: 9300
    name: tcp-es
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 198.51.100.40
  exportTo:
  - "search-service"
  - "logging-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.com
  exportTo:
  - "search-service"
  - "logging-service"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 9200
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.com
        port:
          number: 9200
    timeout: 30s
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 9300
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.com
        port:
          number: 9300
---

  name: external-kafka
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - kafka.external.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.50
  ports:
  - number: 9092
    name: tcp-kafka
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: STATIC
  endpoints:
  - address: 198.51.100.50
  exportTo:
  - "event-service"
  - "streaming-service"
---

    protocol: HTTPS

kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-cdn
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - cdn.cloudfront.net
  exportTo:
  - "media-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - cdn.cloudfront.net
    route:
    - destination:
        host: cdn.cloudfront.net
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-sms-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "sms-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-sms-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.twilio.com
  exportTo:
  - "sms-service"
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/2010-04-01/"
    headers:
      request:
        add:
          x-mesh-egress: "sms-service"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 20s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 5s
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-payment-api-authz
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces: ["payment-service"]
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts: ["api.payment-provider.com"]
        ports: ["443"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-analytics-authz
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces: ["analytics-service"]
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts: ["analytics.thirdparty.com"]
        ports: ["443"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-database-authz
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces: ["backend-service", "data-service"]
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts: ["postgres.external-db.com"]
        ports: ["5432"]
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces: ["user-service"]
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts: ["mongodb.external-db.com"]
        ports: ["27017"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-egress-default
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: egressgateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        hosts: ["*"]
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.payment-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: postgres.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "data-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 60s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: mongodb.external-db.com
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 30
        connectTimeout: 20s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 60s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-redis-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: redis.external-cache.com
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 5s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-s3-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: s3.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: s3.amazonaws.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 10s
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 200
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 5
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: elasticsearch.external.com
  exportTo:
  - "search-service"
  - "logging-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 15s
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-kafka-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: kafka.external.com
  exportTo:
  - "event-service"
  - "streaming-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 40
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 300s
          interval: 60s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 60s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-egress-restriction
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "./*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
